reference: Hello. There is nothing to worry about. This is just a strained muscle of the abdominal wall. Please take rest, a tablet of ibuprofen, and apply hot fomentation. If it persists, please visit a doctor.
text: Hello, there is nothing to worry about. This is just a strained muscle of the abdominal wall. Please take rest, a tablet of ibuprofen, and apply hot fomentation. If it persists, please visit a doctor.
